name: Proline Adult Dog Food - Lamb and Rice 15kg
description: Proline Adult Dog Food -Lamb & Rice , fully balanced all-natural dog food with lamb protein plus brewer's yeast and whey protein for immune support and omega -3 and -6 from flaxseed. Carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein...................21% Fat ........................ 11% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)................ 4% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Meat Flour, Corn Gluten, Liver Aroma, Dried Lamb Meat, Rice, Salt, Whey Powder, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. These nutrients work together to support: . Strong bones & joints. . Healthy immune function. . Optimal metabolism and energy release. Why Dog Parents Choose Proline Lamb & Rice: . Made with premium animal proteins and no artificial colors or preservatives. . Ideal for dogs with sensitive skin or digestive issues. . Designed for overall wellness —from nose.
